query: How much does commercial construction cost per square foot in Houston in 2026?
answer_block:
How much does commercial construction cost per square foot in Houston in 2026? Houston commercial construction runs $190–$330+ per square foot in 2026, up from $185–$325/SF in 2025. The rate depends on building type: industrial/warehouse is the lowest at $130–$220/SF, while medical/healthcare ($250–$420/SF) and hospitality/hotel ($260–$420+/SF) sit at the top end. Use the ranges below for feasibility, ROI, and financing models.

Project TypeCost per SF ($)
Industrial / Warehouse$130 – $220
Office / Corporate$180 – $300
Multifamily / Mixed Use$190 – $320
Retail / Restaurant$200 – $350
Medical / Healthcare$250 – $420
Hospitality / Hotel$260 – $420+
